title: Balanced & Cinematic
description: Moderate energy and mood with a blend of acoustic and produced elements.
insight: This genre sits near the center of the map, reflecting its hybrid nature between emotional storytelling and mainstream structure.

title: Polished & Energetic
description: High-energy, danceable tracks with a bright and polished sound.
insight: K-pop aligns closely with high-energy clusters, emphasizing production quality and rhythmic appeal.

title: Relaxed & Textured
description: Low-energy, acoustic-leaning tracks with smooth, steady rhythm.
insight: Chill music prioritizes atmosphere over intensity, often blending into multiple clusters depending on mood.

title: Emotional but Rhythmic
description: Moderate danceability with lower emotional tone.
insight: Despite its label, 'sad' music is not confined to low-energy regions, appearing across multiple clusters and styles.

title: Raw & Intense
description: High-energy, low-danceability tracks with heavy instrumentation.
insight: Grunge stands out for its intensity and raw sound, aligning with clusters defined by energy rather than rhythm.

title: Balanced & Acoustic
description: Moderate energy and mood with strong acoustic presence.
insight: This genre spans multiple regions, reflecting diverse production styles and musical traditions.

title: Energetic & Instrumental
description: Moderate-to-high energy tracks with a mix of vocals and instrumental elements.
insight: Anime music shows higher instrumental variation, often blending cinematic and pop structures.

title: Bright & Acoustic
description: High-energy, positive tracks with strong acoustic elements.
insight: This genre bridges organic instrumentation with upbeat structure, aligning with both acoustic and energetic clusters.

title: Emotional & Driven
description: Moderate-to-high energy with lower emotional tone.
insight: Emo music blends intensity with introspection, placing it between high-energy and low-valence regions.

title: Balanced & Accessible
description: Moderate energy, high danceability, and broadly neutral-positive mood.
insight: Pop sits at the center of the map, reflecting its role as a convergence point of multiple musical characteristics.
